base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of password_entry_screen — a ui (menu_screen) from 1986 metroid. Password entry — 24-character code-entry grid. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Password entry — 24-character code-entry grid; Metroid uses password-save rather than battery-backed save. Letters + digits + symbols. Code preserves state
